tasks.title: Fix bytesPushed pre-increment: move increment after decoder.push() so convergence byte offsets are accurate
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-line reorder: move bytesPushed += chunk.length to after await decoder.push(chunk). No design decisions needed.

tasks.title: Remove double-dispose: drop dispose() from catch block, keep only in finally (mirrors decodeFinal pattern)
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial removal of the dispose call in the catch block. Same fix also resolves errors-3 (duplicate finding).

tasks.title: Make planShard throw RangeError for n<=0 and out-of-range i to match test assertions
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace silent returns with `throw new RangeError(...)` for the two guard conditions. Also resolves contracts-4 (duplicate). No design judgment needed.

tasks.title: Fix tiling-ingest tests: await imageIdForPath, assert result.outcome not raw result, fix full.tiled assertion
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial test fixes: add await before imageIdForPath calls (lines 58, 84), change .toBe('written') to check .outcome field. Also resolves logic-5, errors-4, errors-5, errors-6, contracts-2, contracts-3 (all duplicates). No logic complexity.

tasks.title: Filter totalStagedBytes reduce to thisRun entries only, consistent with the B10 perImage fix
tasks.reason_for_tier: Apply same thisRun filter already used for perImage to the totalStagedBytes reduce. Also fixes perf-9 (O(N) over all prior-run entries). Two-line change at lines 756 and 926.

tasks.title: Add minimum-advance guard (len > 2 check) in JPEG SOF parser to prevent infinite scan on zero-length segments
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires understanding the JFIF segment structure to write a correct forward-progress guard. Low complexity but needs reasoning about valid/invalid marker sequences.

tasks.title: Add onError callback to pMapLimit so callers (rebuildIndex, removeOrphans) can surface per-item failures
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires designing the callback signature and updating all callers. Also resolves errors-1 (duplicate). Small API shape decision needed.

tasks.title: Change order-violation check from > to >= to prevent silent duplicate-level encode at equal dimensions
tasks.reason_for_tier: Single character change: `>` to `>=` in the order check condition. No design decisions.

tasks.title: Add 'dry-run' variant to IngestOutcome and return it in the dryRun branch to prevent inflated written counts
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires adding 'dry-run' to IngestOutcome union, updating the dryRun return path, and guarding the result.written increment. Also resolves contracts-1 (duplicate). Straightforward but touches type definition + 2 call sites.

tasks.title: Add boundary regression test for planLadder: masterLong exactly equal to a LEVEL_SIZE produces no sidecar for that size
tasks.category: no property-based testing on math/state-heavy code
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add a single test case with masterLong === 1024 asserting the 1024 size is absent from planLadder output. Trivial test addition.

tasks.title: Validate imageId against /^[0-9a-f]{16}$/ in rm subcommand before any path operations
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add a regex guard immediately after imageId is resolved from target. Also closes security-5 (lock.ts receives validated imageId). One-line guard plus error message.

tasks.title: Add .regex(/^[0-9a-f]{16}$/) to levelEntrySchema contenthash field to prevent path traversal via crafted manifests
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-line Zod schema change. Also resolves security-4 and security-10 (all same root cause). Consistent with imageId validation already at schema.ts:61.

tasks.title: ADR: plan migration from 64-bit to 96-bit truncated SHA-256 content hash before gallery reaches 2B objects
tasks.reason_for_tier: Hash width change is a manifest format migration requiring a new schema version, migration tooling, and backward-compat strategy. Needs architectural decision before implementation.

tasks.title: Redact sensitive CLI flags (--config, --out paths) from runlog args before writing
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace sensitive flag values with redacted placeholders in the args array before writing to runlog. Trivial string-scan over argv.

tasks.title: Add --strip-gps CLI flag and expose it through IngestOptions to allow GPS opt-out on sensitive species locations
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires adding the flag to CLI parser, threading it through IngestOptions, and updating the Zod options schema. Straightforward but touches multiple files.

tasks.title: Prevent detached workP from mutating image directory after timeout: add a cancelled flag checked in applyIngestPlan
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires threading a cancellation token into applyIngestPlan and checking it between write phases. Involves understanding the write phase ordering. Straightforward but multi-site change.

tasks.title: Fix abort handler: release imgLock before breaking out of dispatcher loop when abort fires between lock acquire and pending.set()
tasks.category: lock ordering / missing lock on abort path
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires careful analysis of the dispatcher coroutine lifecycle to identify all paths where imgLock is held but not registered in pending. Multi-point fix.

tasks.title: Hold gallery write lock during GC orphan scan or increase GRACE_MS to cover longest observed ingest duration
tasks.category: TOCTOU / missing lock during GC scan
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires deciding between lock-scope expansion (architectural) vs GRACE_MS increase (simple). The lock approach needs analysis of deadlock risk with concurrent ingest.

tasks.title: Fix cachedSsim lazy-init: assign a pending Promise before the await to prevent double-import on concurrent callers
tasks.reason_for_tier: Apply the same pending-promise pattern used in conc-6 (raw-backend). Assign `initPromise` synchronously before the await. Trivial pattern change.

tasks.title: Fix lock order inversion in rm: acquire gallery write lock before per-image lock to match batch path ordering
tasks.category: lock ordering / missing lock on abort path
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires restructuring the rm lock acquisition order and verifying no functional behavior changes. Must confirm gallery lock semantics allow rm to acquire it before reading the manifest.

tasks.title: Reset completedDirty=true if doPersist fails to ensure next scheduleCompletedPersist retries the flush
tasks.reason_for_tier: Change `.catch(() => {})` to `.catch(() => { completedDirty = true; })` so failed persists are retried. One-line fix.

tasks.title: ADR: design AbortSignal threading through ingestImage into WASM decode/encode for interrupt-on-timeout
tasks.reason_for_tier: WASM push() is synchronous per CLAUDE.md invariants; true mid-push cancellation requires worker_threads isolation. Complex architectural decision requiring Opus-level reasoning about trade-offs.

tasks.title: Serialize concurrent forceFlushCheckpoint calls with a pending-write guard to prevent overlapping doPersist
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add a `flushInProgress` Promise flag analogous to flushTimer guard in scheduleCompletedPersist. Straightforward pattern.

tasks.title: Narrow getCachedSsimFn outer catch to only handle import errors, not property-access TypeErrors
tasks.reason_for_tier: Move property access chain outside the try block so TypeError from bad ssimMod shape surfaces rather than being swallowed as cachedSsim=null.

tasks.title: Reserve a minimum budget for waitForReadLocksToClear by computing drain deadline after wx-create succeeds
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires redesigning how timeoutMs is split between the outer retry loop and the drain phase. Needs reasoning about worst-case partition to avoid spurious timeout errors.

tasks.title: Replace empty catch in runlog write with stderr warning so runlog failures are visible
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace `catch {}` with `catch (e) { process.stderr.write(...) }`. One-line change.

tasks.title: Wrap rm imgLock + removeImage in try/finally to guarantee imgLock.release() on error paths
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add try/finally around the removeImage call block so imgLock.release() is guaranteed. Trivial restructure.

tasks.title: Add explicit height > 0 guard in buildManifest before aspect ratio division for diagnosable errors
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add `if (args.height <= 0) throw new RangeError(...)` before the division. One-line guard.

tasks.title: Replace bare catch {} for SSIM/Butteraugli per-pass errors with a logged warning to catch silent quality-curve gaps
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace `catch {}` with `catch (e) { tel?.warn?.(...) || console.warn(...) }`. Trivial.

tasks.title: ADR: introduce structured IngestError class with a code property for programmatic classification of timeout/size/lock failures
tasks.reason_for_tier: Affects all error throw sites across ingest.ts, lock.ts, cli.ts. Needs agreement on the code enum before implementation to avoid churn.

tasks.title: Include err.stack in image-failed telemetry event for WASM panic post-mortem diagnosis
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add `stack: err instanceof Error ? err.stack : undefined` to the event payload. One field addition.

tasks.title: Replace empty catch in rm imageIdForPath resolution with user-visible error message when path is not found
tasks.category: missing null check / unbounded input assumption
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace `catch {}` with `catch (e) { console.error('cannot resolve path'); process.exit(1); }`. Trivial.

tasks.title: Apply exponential backoff (capped at 500ms) to waitForReadLocksToClear polling to reduce I/O on slow FS
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace fixed 50-100ms sleep with `Math.min(500, 50 * 2^retryCount)`. Trivial arithmetic change.

tasks.title: Add 'unknown' to MasterFormat union type to match what masterInfoSchema already allows in schema.ts
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires confirming all callers of MasterFormat handle the 'unknown' discriminant, then removing the `as any` cast. Small type-propagation analysis needed.

tasks.title: Add Zod schema validation in readCheckpoint with fallback-to-null on parse failure for corrupt checkpoint resilience
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires writing a CheckpointStateSchema with z.array fallbacks for .completed/.failed/.inFlight and wiring it into readCheckpoint. Straightforward schema definition work.

tasks.title: Fix CliEvent 'image-done' type literal to 'image-end' to match actual emission in ingest.ts and cli.ts
tasks.reason_for_tier: Single string replacement: 'image-done' → 'image-end'. Verify no consumers rely on the wrong string.

tasks.title: Validate --migrate-schema target against SUPPORTED_SCHEMA_TARGETS before calling migrateSchema to surface unsupported version errors
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add validation at CLI parse time and check migrateSchema return value for errors. Requires understanding what migrateSchema returns on failure. Straightforward.

tasks.title: Add Zod CliEventSchema and integration test that validates --json stdout events against it
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires converting CliEvent TypeScript union to a Zod discriminated union schema and adding a test that spawns the CLI and validates captured JSON events. Straightforward but multi-file.

tasks.title: Add a catch-all z.object({schema: z.number()}) to manifestSchema to produce a clear 'unsupported schema version' error
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace discriminated union failure with a `.catch()` fallback that checks schema number and throws a friendly message. Needs understanding of Zod union evaluation order.

tasks.title: Eliminate double pixel buffer copy: construct refImg directly from finalPixels ArrayBuffer without Uint8ClampedArray.from()
tasks.reason_for_tier: Need to verify ssim.js accepts Uint8Array data field or requires Uint8ClampedArray specifically, then choose the lightest-weight wrapper. Involves reading the ssim.js API contract.

tasks.title: Pre-allocate reusable Uint8ClampedArray scratch buffer for progressive-pass SSIM to eliminate 500MB-1GB GC pressure per level
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires allocating outside the event handler and using .set() for each pass. Must handle size changes between levels (resize or re-allocate). Straightforward but needs lifecycle reasoning.

tasks.title: Cache probeOrientation result to avoid double EXIF parse for JPG paths in computeIngestPlan + buildFallbackPlan
tasks.reason_for_tier: Extract probeOrientation call to a variable passed to both planning paths. Trivial refactor.

tasks.title: Parallelize removeOrphans stat/unlink and empty-image-dir checks using pMapLimit(16)
tasks.reason_for_tier: Wrap both serial loops (perf-4 and perf-5) in pMapLimit calls. Straightforward but must use the updated pMapLimit with error propagation from task 018-T07.

tasks.title: Replace fileExists+readFile pattern in rebuildIndex with readFileOrNull to reduce syscall count by 50%
tasks.reason_for_tier: readFileOrNull already exists (validate.ts:55). Replace two-call pattern with single call. Trivial.

tasks.title: Replace regex f.replace(/\.jxl$/, '') with f.slice(0, -4) in orphan scan loop for consistency with validate.ts
tasks.reason_for_tier: Single-line substitution. No logic change.

tasks.title: Change index.json serialization from pretty-printed (null, 2) to compact JSON.stringify to reduce I/O by ~25%
tasks.reason_for_tier: Remove the `null, 2` indentation arguments. One-character change consistent with checkpoint.ts.

tasks.title: Replace opts spread on each worker dispatch with a purpose-built minimal job type to avoid copying statMap on every dispatch
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires defining a WorkerJobOpts type that only includes serializable fields, then updating the worker deserializer. Straightforward but touches worker protocol.

tasks.title: Add telemetry breakdown to profileConvergenceCurve: separate decodeFinal vs progressive decode vs per-pass metric durations
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add Date.now() timestamps around the three phases and emit them in the stage event. Trivial instrumentation.

tasks.title: ADR: add ingest throughput benchmark measuring wall-time and per-image latency for the full pyramid-ingest pipeline
tasks.reason_for_tier: Benchmark design requires choosing fixture corpus, success metrics, and CI integration. Architectural decision before writing benchmark code.

tasks.title: Replace serial per-level stat in --explain with single readdir + Set.has() lookup
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace for-await-stat loop with one readdir call and a Set membership check. Trivial IO pattern change.
